title: Hokkaido Gals Are Super Adorable!
sourceNotes: Single-season, 12-episode TV anime (SILVER LINK./Blade, 2024) adapts manga ch. 1-32 (~through vol. 4). Manga complete at 123 chapters (14 vols). Slice-of-life romance source with no formally named arcs — largely one-to-a-few chapters per episode pacing.
